summary: Reviews visibility feature fully tested. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified - Dashboard shows 'YOUR OPINION MATTERS!' section with stats, Navigation has Reviews link, /reviews page accessible with form functional, Admin panel has Reviews tab with statistics.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reviews - Returns public reviews without authentication (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/reviews - Reviews contain expected fields (review_id, user_id, user_name, rating, title, content, is_public, created_at)
Backend: POST /api/reviews - Create new review with authentication (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/reviews - Private reviews hidden from public list
Backend: POST /api/reviews - Returns 401 without authentication
Backend: POST /api/reviews - Rating clamped between 1-5
Backend: GET /api/admin/reviews - Admin sees all reviews with stats
Backend: GET /api/admin/reviews - Returns 401 without authentication
Backend: GET /api/user/reviews - Returns current user's reviews
Backend: Full review flow - Create -> Verify in public -> Verify in admin -> Verify in user reviews
Frontend: Dashboard 'Donner un Avis' quick button (data-testid='quick-reviews-btn') visible
Frontend: Dashboard 'YOUR OPINION MATTERS!' section visible with stats (4.6 avg rating, 7 reviews)
Frontend: Dashboard 'Leave a review' button (data-testid='leave-review-btn') visible
Frontend: Dashboard 'View reviews' button (data-testid='view-reviews-btn') visible
Frontend: Navigation 'Reviews' link (data-testid='nav-reviews') visible
Frontend: /reviews page accessible and displays 'CUSTOMER REVIEWS' header
Frontend: /reviews page shows average rating and review count
Frontend: /reviews page shows 'Leave a review' button for logged-in users
Frontend: Review form - Rating stars visible and interactive
Frontend: Review form - Title input visible
Frontend: Review form - Content textarea visible
Frontend: Review form - 'Make public' checkbox visible
Frontend: Review form - Submit and Cancel buttons visible
Frontend: Review form submission successful - Success toast 'Thank you for your review!'
Frontend: Admin Reviews tab visible in Admin panel (data-testid='tab-reviews')
Frontend: Admin Reviews - 'Customer Reviews Management' section visible
Frontend: Admin Reviews - Statistics (Avg Rating: 4.5, Total: 6, Distribution) visible
Frontend: Admin Reviews - Shows both public and private reviews
Frontend: Admin Reviews - Reply and Delete buttons available
seed_data_creation: 7 reviews exist (including TEST_* reviews from pytest)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews feature complete. Backend endpoints: GET /api/reviews (public), POST /api/reviews (auth), GET /api/user/reviews (auth), GET /api/admin/reviews (admin), PUT /api/admin/reviews/{id}/respond (admin), DELETE /api/admin/reviews/{id} (admin). Frontend: /reviews page with form, Dashboard section 'YOUR OPINION MATTERS!', Admin panel Reviews tab with stats.

features_verified.dashboard_opinion_section: YES - 'YOUR OPINION MATTERS!' section with stars, avg rating (4.6), review count (7)
features_verified.navigation_reviews_link: YES - data-testid='nav-reviews' visible with star icon
features_verified.reviews_page_shows_public_reviews: YES - Shows reviews with user name, rating, date, title, content
features_verified.reviews_page_form_for_logged_in: YES - 'Leave a review' button visible, form expands on click
features_verified.review_form_elements: YES - Rating stars, title input, content textarea, public checkbox, submit/cancel buttons
features_verified.review_form_submission: YES - Form submits successfully, success toast shown, review appears in list
features_verified.admin_reviews_tab: YES - data-testid='tab-reviews' visible with badge showing count
features_verified.admin_reviews_stats: YES - Shows Avg Rating (4.5), Total (6), Distribution (5-star: 4, 4-star: 1, 3-star: 1)
features_verified.admin_can_see_private_reviews: YES - Private reviews shown with 'Private' badge
features_verified.admin_reply_button: YES - Reply (paper plane icon) button available
